allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in s['tables'].get\('public.client_table',{}\).get\('columns',{}\).items\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { Client } = require\('pg'\); const c = new Client\({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('connected'\); c.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\('error:', e.message\)\);")
